body: ## Description This PR implements the initial CI/CD pipeline and enhances community health files, aligning with the "Hydrate" task and the "CI/CD & Automation Plan". Key changes include: * **CI/CD Workflows**: Added GitHub Actions for continuous integration (`ci.yml`) including testing, linting, coverage reporting, and extension packaging. A publish workflow (`publish.yml`) is also included for automated marketplace releases. * **Community Health Files**: Created `ISSUE_TEMPLATE`, `pull_request_template.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` to streamline contributions and issue management. * **Documentation Updates**: `README.md` has been updated with CI/CD status badges, detailed platform support information (macOS, Windows/Linux plans), and current test coverage metrics. `package.json` keywords were also updated. * **Plan Updates**: The `docs/plans/2025-12-11_plan_inProgress_CICD.md` and `docs/plans/2025-12-11_plan_inProgress_PrepareForDeploy.md` documents have been updated to reflect the completion of CI/CD phases. This work establishes a robust development pipeline and improves project maintainability and community engagement before the initial release. Fixes # ## Type of change - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [x] Documentation update ## How Has This Been Tested? - [x] Local `npm test` and `npm run compile` commands were executed successfully. - [x] The new CI workflow (`.github/workflows/ci.yml`) is configured to run tests and linting on push/PR, which will be verified upon merging and pushing to GitHub. ## Checklist: - [x] My code follows the style guidelines of this project - [x] I have performed a self-review of my own code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (N/A for config/doc files) - [x] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [x] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works (CI workflow runs existing tests) - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes ---
title: Agent documentation and plans
